# DEFACEDWORLD — SEO & Digital Growth Agency
# https://defacedworld.com

## About
DEFACEDWORLD is an SEO audit and digital growth agency founded by Spencer Wilkinson.
We offer free instant SEO audits, full audit reports, SEO implementation, and ongoing
growth retainers for businesses of all sizes across the United States.

## Key pages
- Homepage & free SEO audit tool: https://defacedworld.com/
- Services & pricing: https://defacedworld.com/services
- About Spencer Wilkinson: https://defacedworld.com/about
- Contact: https://defacedworld.com/contact

## Blog — SEO guides and resources
- What is an SEO audit: https://defacedworld.com/blog/what-is-an-seo-audit
- Why your website isn't on Google: https://defacedworld.com/blog/why-your-website-isnt-showing-up-on-google
- Meta descriptions guide: https://defacedworld.com/blog/meta-descriptions-guide
- Local SEO for small business: https://defacedworld.com/blog/local-seo-for-small-business
- Google Business Profile setup: https://defacedworld.com/blog/google-business-profile-setup
- LLM SEO & GEO guide: https://defacedworld.com/blog/llm-seo-geo-guide

## Services
- Free instant SEO audit: https://defacedworld.com/ (no account required)
- Audit Report: $497 one-time — https://defacedworld.com/services#audit
- Audit + Fix: $1,497 one-time — https://defacedworld.com/services#fix
- Growth Retainer: $997/month — https://defacedworld.com/services#retainer
